name: qualia-v4-pointers-empty-state
description: Newly-selected node with no pointers — Properties panel should show the empty-state copy and an '+ Add pointer' button. Tests the Wave A → B authoring surface from the qualia-v4 plan.

checkpoints.name: pointers-empty-state
checkpoints.description: Right-hand Properties panel must show: (1) selected node fields (label/type/subtitle), (2) uppercase 'POINTERS' section header, (3) muted 'No pointers…' empty-state line, (4) dashed '+ Add pointer' button. Pass only if ALL four are present. Reasoning ≤ 20 words; just list which of 1-4 is missing, or write 'all present' if pass.
